preferred_source.title: ICG Final Results FY March 2025
preferred_source.notes: Full-year results announcement — key metrics on fund performance, management fees, and balance sheet investments

best_artifact.title: ICG final results for the financial year ended 31 March 2025 - ICG
relevant_snippets: AUM of $112bn; fee-earning AUM of $75bn, up 8% [1] compared to FY24 and five-year annualised growth of 14% [1]
Management fees of £604m, up 19% [2] compared to FY24
Operating cashflow of £518m, up 44% compared to FY24 (£359m)
Total ordinary dividend per share for FY25 of 83p, 15 th consecutive annual increase

We raised $24bn from our global client base. Fundraising highlights for the year include closing the world’s largest fund dedicated to GP-led secondaries ( Strategic Equity V) and Europe’s largest direct lending fundraising ( SDP V), as well as having our largest ever vintage-to-vintage upsize ( Europe Mid-Market II, 3x larger than the prior vintage).
